title: CHUANGSEED 6 Rolls Black Electrical Tape 19mm x 20m Black Strong Self-Adhesive PVC Electrical Insulation Tape for Insulating, Repairing and Protecting Electrical Wires Installations Connections
features: Great value for money: Each roll of electrical tape measures 19mm x 20 meters and comes in a pack of 6 rolls, giving you plenty of material to complete multiple tasks and projects.

High Quality: Made of PVC material, moisture-resistant, corrosion-resistant, UV-resistant, and has excellent temperature stability. It can withstand -20°C to +80°C, and insulation protection is suitable for primary insulation up to 600 volts, so you can meet all your needs
Tips: Clean the surface oil stain before winding to ensure long-lasting stickiness. Avoid direct sunlight when storing, humidity ≤ 70%, temperature 10~30°C (to prevent glue line aging)

Versatile: Suitable for DIY enthusiasts and professionals alike, our electrical tapes can be used both indoors and outdoors and are suitable for a variety of surfaces, including metal, plastic, rubber, and composite surfaces, so you can meet all your needs

Versatile: Our PVC electrical tapes are suitable for all your electrical wiring needs, such as splicing wires, wire bundling and cable insulation, appliance maintenance, electronic component protection, sealing and wrapping, temporary repairs, and packaging and sealing
